regulatory_risks: Enhanced supervision and regulation of systemically important firms under Dodd-Frank Act
Regulatory capital, leverage and liquidity requirements (Basel III, stress testing)
Living will requirements and orderly liquidation authority
Deposit insurance assessments and potential special assessments by FDIC
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) regulations on consumer financial products
CFPB rule on personal financial data rights (Section 1033 of Dodd-Frank Act) requiring data sharing with third parties
CFTC and SEC comprehensive regulation of swaps and security-based swaps
Climate change disclosure requirements (SEC rules, California laws, EU CSRD and CSDDD)
USA PATRIOT Act requirements on anti-money laundering, economic sanctions, and due diligence
Consent orders and regulatory actions requiring changes to business operations and risk management
Privacy provisions under Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act and Fair Credit Reporting Act
Restrictions on dividend payments and share repurchases based on capital planning and stress test results
Federal Reserve Board enhanced prudential requirements for large BHCs
OCC heightened governance and risk management standards for large national banks
Sarbanes-Oxley Act corporate governance and accounting measures
State-level climate-related disclosure laws and sustainability restrictions
Varying and potentially conflicting approaches by governments on climate change regulations

sanction_risks: OFAC sanctions compliance - accounts held by Government of Iran employees blocked and reported
Executive Order 13224 sanctions - wire deposits related to legal services for designated persons
